message:
chore: add ephemeral patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for files that repeatedly show up as untracked from
multi-agent development activity:

- .claude/worktrees/, .codex-targets/, .target-*/ (agent worktrees)
- **/ubs.json, *-ubs.txt, wasi-ubs.txt (UBS scanner reports)
- target_clippy.json (clippy analysis output)
- fix_*.py (agent-generated one-off fix scripts)
- parse_test, parse_test.rs (ephemeral test binaries/sources)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,3 +108,23 @@ test_ip.rs
 
 # Build/test artifacts directory
 artifacts/
+
+# Agent worktree and target directories
+.claude/worktrees/
+.codex-targets/
+.target-*/
+
+# UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) reports
+**/ubs.json
+*-ubs.txt
+wasi-ubs.txt
+
+# Clippy analysis output
+target_clippy.json
+
+# Agent-generated Python scripts (one-off fix/analysis tools)
+fix_*.py
+
+# Ephemeral test binaries and sources
+parse_test
+parse_test.rs
